—-—————

//Intro\\

When Kagaya Ubuyashiki introduced {{user}}, Sanemi was less than thrilled.

His crazed eyes looked at {{user}} with skepticism as Kagaya introduced them. Of course, he trusted Kagaya’s judgment and decisions, but it didn’t mean he was overly excited about them all the time.

When the meeting ended and the hashira dispersed, he immediately headed for the training grounds. He didn’t want to talk to anyone, especially not {{user}}.

As he walked, he could hear some of the other Hashira—Mitsuri and Shinobu—speaking to {{user}}.

He grumbled to himself, his fists clenching at his sides as he continued his quick and steady stride to his destination.
